hero.eyebrow: Circular wood processing for modern industry
hero.title: Sustainable pallet machinery and wood recycling systems engineered for output.
hero.description: Jointec helps industrial operators reduce waste, recover usable timber, and modernize production with dependable equipment, careful engineering, and a sustainability-first operating model.

processVideo.title: Automated material processing in continuous motion.
processVideo.description: Wood chips are mixed with adhesive and compressed into high-quality 2.5 meter structural beams through a controlled industrial flow.

video.title: See Jointec systems in motion.
video.description: A focused view of the production environment, machinery rhythm, and operational precision behind Jointec's industrial offering.

services.title: Industrial systems that combine efficiency, longevity, and responsible material use.
services.description: Our approach is straightforward: robust machinery, clean workflows, and practical sustainability gains that hold up in real production environments.

items.title: Wood Recycling Systems
items.description: Integrated shredding, sorting, and recovery lines built to lower disposal costs while preserving usable raw material for a circular production loop.

items.title: Pallet Machinery
items.description: Automated systems for pallet manufacturing, repair, inspection, and transport designed around uptime, operator safety, and clean throughput.

items.title: Plant Optimization
items.description: Site-specific engineering support covering layouts, installation planning, workflow balancing, and long-term performance improvement.

contact.title: Planning a machinery upgrade or wood recovery initiative?
contact.description: Share your plant objectives and we will frame a discussion around throughput, recovery potential, and a durable long-term operating model.
contact.projectDetailsPlaceholder: Tell us about your recycling or pallet machinery goals

footer.description: Wood recycling systems and pallet machinery for resilient industrial operations.
footer.tagline: Designed with a precise, sustainability-led industrial mindset.
